summary: Complete testing of AgriBooks PO Redesign: New PO form with all fields, 3 action buttons (Save Draft/Receive on Terms/Pay in Cash), discounts, freight, VAT, PO List with filter chips + DR# column, Pay Supplier with live fund balances. CRITICAL BUG FIXED: GET /purchase-orders was missing @router.get('') decorator - PO List was returning 405 Method Not Allowed.

critical.issue: Missing @router.get('') decorator on list_purchase_orders function - returned 405 Method Not Allowed. FIXED by testing agent.

ui_bugs.component: PO List - Payment Badge for Draft POs
ui_bugs.issue: Draft POs show 'Terms · unpaid' badge in Payment column. A draft PO may show a confusing payment badge since it hasn't been received yet. Minor UX inconsistency.

issues: React devtools warns about <span data-ve-dynamic> injected by visual editor between <tbody> and <tr>. This is from the dev environment VE overlay, NOT from E1's code. No action needed.

action_items: ALREADY FIXED: Added @router.get('') decorator to list_purchase_orders function in /app/backend/routes/purchase_orders.py
Consider: Draft PO in PO List shows 'Terms · unpaid' payment badge - may want to show a neutral 'Draft' label in Payment column instead
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: GET /purchase-orders was missing @router.get('') decorator - critical bug that would break PO List tab entirely

The Terms dialog only shows COD as default - need to verify all 6 terms options (COD, Net 7, Net 15, Net 30, Net 45, Net 60) are available in the dropdown (confirmed via backend test - terms_label field stored correctly)
Draft PO payment badge shows 'Terms · unpaid' - frontend badge logic may need a check for po_type === 'draft' to show a different badge

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all major flows working, minor UX issue with draft PO badge)

seed_data_creation: Test PO created via UI: PO-20260222093739-BC58 (SUPPLIER 1, draft, ₱50.00). Multiple test POs created/deleted by backend tests (all cleaned up with delete).
context_for_next_testing_agent: PO redesign is complete and working. Key details: Main Branch Downtown branch_id=agribooks-preview, Cashier=2810, Safe=54999. GET /purchase-orders had missing decorator bug - was fixed. All 3 PO types (draft/terms/cash) work correctly. UI: branch switching requires JS click on dropdown item (not button text click). Product selection: use ArrowDown+Enter after typing in SmartProductSearch. Draft PO UI test PO-20260222093739-BC58 may still be in DB (draft status).

rca_of_issue.root_cause: The async def list_purchase_orders() function in /app/backend/routes/purchase_orders.py was defined WITHOUT the @router.get('') decorator. The function existed but was never registered as a GET route handler.
rca_of_issue.mitigation: Added @router.get('') decorator immediately before the function definition at line 96 of purchase_orders.py. Server hot-reloaded automatically. Now returns 200 with purchase_orders list and total.
